heading: Accounts of officers, agents or contractors
label: 1494 Accounts of officers, agents or contractors
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on title 28, U.S.C., 1940 ed., § 287 (, ; , ).Mar. 3, 1911, ch. 231, § 18036 Stat. 1141Feb. 13, 1925, ch. 229, § 343 Stat. 939Only the jurisdictional provisions of , U.S.C., 1940 ed., are contained in this section. children.text: claimant or the person he represents has applied to the proper department of the Government for settlement of the account;
three years have elapsed from the date of such application without settlement; and
no suit upon the same has been brought by the United States.
